full_name: General structural steel St37-2, material number 1.0037 (old DIN 17100 designation; superseded by S235JR per EN 10025-2)
scope: Classic non-alloy general structural steel from the withdrawn DIN 17100 standard. Used for buildings, bridges, and load-bearing structures. New designation is S235JR (1.0038); St37 variants were St37-2, USt37-2, RSt37-2, St37-3.
license_note: composition/property data for this withdrawn grade are widely republished by independent free sources, not the copyrighted DIN document text
